description: OS Command Injection vulnerability in the wirelessConnect handler of Abode iota All-In-One Security Kit allows an attacker to inject commands and gain root access. This issue affects: Abode iota All-In-One Security Kit versions prior to 1.0.2.23_6.9V_dev_t2_homekit_RF_2.0.19_s2_kvsABODE oz.
Claude Reasoning: Abode iota All-In-One Security Kit is a consumer home security/alarm system; root command injection on it is in scope.

description: SimpliSafe Original has Unencrypted Sensor Transmissions, which allows physically proximate attackers to obtain potentially sensitive information about the specific times when alarm-system events occur.
SQUID is vulnerable to HTTP request smuggling, caused by chunked decoder lenience, allows a remote attacker to perform Request/Response smuggling past firewall and frontend security systems.

An issue was discovered in post2file.php in Up.Time Monitoring Station 7.5.0 (build 16) and 7.4.0 (build 13). It allows an attacker to upload an arbitrary file, such as a .php file that can execute arbitrary OS commands.
File upload vulnerability in ejinshan v8+ terminal security system allows attackers to upload arbitrary files to arbitrary locations on the server.
Gemini Reasoning: The 'terminal security system' by ejinshan refers to a server-side security software/appliance used for terminal security management, typically in enterprise or industrial settings, rather than a residential home alarm system.

description: Authentication bypass using an alternate path or channel in SimpliSafe SS3 firmware 1.4 allows a local, unauthenticated attacker to pair a rogue keypad to an armed system.

In ApexPro Telemetry Server Versions 4.2 and prior, CARESCAPE Telemetry Server v4.2 & prior, Clinical Information Center (CIC) Versions 4.X and 5.X, CARESCAPE Central Station (CSCS) Versions 1.X, B450 Version 2.X, B650 Version 1.X, B650 Version 2.X, B850 Version 1.X, B850 Version 2.X, a vulnerability in the software update mechanism allows an authenticated attacker to upload arbitrary files on the system through a crafted update package.

Directory traversal vulnerability in javatester_init.php in IBM Lotus Protector for Mail Security 2.1, 2.5, 2.5.1, and 2.8 and IBM ISS Proventia Network Mail Security System allows remote authenticated administrators to read arbitrary files via a .. (dot dot) in the template parameter.
In Siren Investigate before 13.2.2, session keys remain active even after logging out.
Weak security in the transmitter of Blitzwolf BW-IS22 Smart Home Security Alarm v1.0 allows attackers to gain full access to the system via a code replay attack.
